description.ko: ECHO-0는 복잡한 오디오 신호를 빛과 기하학의 실체적인 풍경으로 해독하여 사용자가 소리의 구조를 시각적으로 경험할 수 있게 하는 첨단 시각화 시스템입니다.
description.en: ECHO-0 is an advanced visualization system that decodes complex audio signals into a tangible landscape of light and geometry, allowing users to see the architecture of sound.

prompt: A futuristic digital installation representing sound visualization, where sonic frequencies manifest as glowing 3D geometric waves and pulsing light particles in a dark void. High-tech aesthetic, neon cyan and magenta accents, fluid motion, cinematic depth of field, 8k resolution, sharp details, algorithmic art style.
